name: Zignago Vetro S.p.A.
summary: Zignago Vetro S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, produces and markets hollow glass containers for food and beverage, cosmetics, perfumery, and specialty glass markets in Italy, rest of Europe, and internationally. The company offers containers, such as bottles for fragrances, nail varnishes, and skin care and cream jars; jars for baby-food; specialty containers for wine, vinegar, olive oils, distillates, and liquors; and customized glass containers. It also engages in the glass recycling activities that include treatment and sale of recycled glass. The company is based in Fossalta di Portogruaro, Italy. Zignago Vetro S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Zignago Holding S.p.A.
